title: frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: The eslint-disable comment above the empty [] dep array is intentional but undocumented. A brief inline note like '// intentional: register once on mount' would aid future readers.
Clean migration from deprecated addListener/removeListener to standard addEventListener/removeEventListener. Handler type correctly narrowed to MediaQueryListEvent. Tests updated in lock-step.
